===''Pokémon the Series''=== [[File:Wulfric anime.png|thumb|250px|Wulfric in {{aniseries|XY}}]] Wulfric debuted in ''[[XY120|All Hail the Ice Battlefield!]]'', where Ash battled him in an attempt to earn his eighth Kalos Gym [[Badge]]. Despite only using two Pokémon to battle Ash's three, Wulfric emerged victorious. Wulfric then explained that Ash is not having enough trust in his bond with {{AP|Greninja}}, which left the latter in serious doubt. In ''[[XY122|A Real Icebreaker!]]'', Ash, having gotten over a subsequent bout of depression from Wulfric's explanation, challenged him to a [[rematch]]. This time, Ash put up a much better fight, eventually leaving both sides with one Pokémon each: Ash's Greninja standing up against Wulfric's {{p|Abomasnow}}. With its now-perfected Ash-Greninja form, Greninja was easily able to gain an upper hand in the battle. However, Wulfric then suddenly [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolved]] his Abomasnow, giving it a massive power boost. Despite this, Ash was eventually able to win the battle, earning him the {{badge|Iceberg}}. Wulfric appeared in a fantasy in ''[[XY125|A League of His Own!]]'', when Ash was talking to [[Everett]] about the Gym Leaders that he had defeated in Kalos, in order for him to be able to compete in the [[Lumiose Conference]]. In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', Wulfric was seen in the [[Kalos Route 20|Winding Woods]], watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] while being surrounded by some [[wild Pokémon]] in the forest. In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', Wulfric and Abomasnow were among those who helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. Wulfric reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. ====Character==== Wulfric is a determined Gym Leader in battles, to the point when he even becomes slightly impatient. He likes when his challenger is motivated and driven through the battle and wants to see their fiery, burning passion. Wulfric believes progress and victories can be achieved if the Trainer really trusts their Pokémon. He wants to see this during the battle and sometimes changes his strategy to see such passion. Wulfric has a slight speaking problem, sometimes saying, "You know..." when describing something. ====Pokémon==== {{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}} This listing is of Wulfric's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: =====On hand===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Wulfric |pkmn=Abomasnow |mega=yes |gender=male |type1=Grass |type2=Ice |img=Wulfric Abomasnow.png |cap=Wulfric's Abomasnow |img2=Wulfric Mega Abomasnow.png |cap2=Wulfric's Mega Abomasnow |epnum=XY120 |epname=All Hail the Ice Battlefield! |vajp= |vaen=Marc Thompson |desc={{p|Abomasnow}} was the first Pokémon Wulfric used during his Gym battle with Ash and was sent up against {{AP|Hawlucha}}. Although he battled hard, Hawlucha's speed and supereffective attacks proved to be too much for him to handle and he was quickly defeated. However he managed to set up a {{OBP|hail|weather condition}}storm which, between damaging Ash's Pokémon and restoring the energy of {{p|Avalugg}} through {{a|Ice Body}}, contributed significantly to Ash's later defeat. Abomasnow reappeared in ''[[XY122|A Real Icebreaker!]]'', where he was Wulfric's final Pokémon in his rematch with Ash. He soon defeated [[Ash's Talonflame]], despite the massive type disadvantage. Ash's next choice was {{AP|Greninja}}, who soon gained an upper hand on Abomasnow and turned into its Ash-Greninja form, overpowering Abomasnow even further. Wulfric then revealed that Abomasnow was capable of [[Mega Evolution|Mega Evolving]] and triggered the process, making Ash-Greninja's opponent a Mega Abomasnow. Despite the increase in power, Mega Abomasnow was eventually defeated by Ash-Greninja, winning the match for Ash and earning him the {{badge|Iceberg}}. He reappeared in ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', where he helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]]. Abomasnow reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''. Abomasnow's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Wood Hammer}}, {{m|Blizzard}}{{tt|*|In the Poké TV segment for XY120}}, {{m|Energy Ball}}, and {{m|Ice Punch}}, and his Ability is {{a|Snow Warning}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Wulfric |pkmn=Avalugg |type1=Ice |img=Wulfric Avalugg.png |epnum=XY120 |epname=All Hail the Ice Battlefield! |vajp= |vaen=Robby Duncan Sharpe |desc={{p|Avalugg}} was the second Pokémon used by Wulfric in his Gym battle with Ash. With the hailstorm set up by Abomasnow, Avalugg was able to use its Ice Body Ability to keep regaining health during the entire battle. It quickly defeated Ash's Hawlucha, after which Ash chose to use {{AP|Talonflame}}. Using Talonflame's great {{stat|Speed}} to his advantage, Wulfric had Avalugg use Avalanche, which was powered up due to Avalugg acting after its opponent. This eventually led to Talonflame's defeat, and Ash sent out {{AP|Greninja}} as his final Pokémon. Even though Greninja managed to freeze Avalugg's legs with quickly freezing {{m|Water Shuriken}}s and then transform into its Ash-Greninja form, it still wound up being defeated, costing Ash the battle. It reappeared in a flashback in the [[XY121|next episode]]. Avalugg reappeared in ''[[XY122|A Real Icebreaker!]]'', being the second Pokémon used by Wulfric in Ash's rematch against him. It managed to defeat [[Ash's Pikachu]], after which Ash chose to use Talonflame. This time, Talonflame was able to claim victory over the Iceberg Pokémon. Avalugg's known moves are {{m|Stone Edge}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Avalanche}}, and {{m|Ice Fang}}, and its Ability is {{a|Ice Body}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Wulfric |pkmn=Bergmite |type1=Ice |img=Wulfric Bergmite.png |epnum=XY122 |epname=A Real Icebreaker! |vajp= |vaen=Robby Duncan Sharpe |desc={{p|Bergmite}} was used by Wulfric in Ash's rematch against him in ''[[XY122|A Real Icebreaker!]]'', where it battled against [[Ash's Pikachu]]. Despite proving itself to be surprisingly tough, it was eventually defeated with a supereffective {{m|Iron Tail}}. It is unknown if this Bergmite is one of the five Bergmite that greet visiting Trainers at the Gym, or a separate one Wulfric uses for Gym battles. Bergmite's known moves are {{m|Icy Wind}}, {{m|Sharpen}}, and {{m|Rapid Spin}}.}} =====At the Gym===== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Wulfric |pkmn=Bergmite (×5) |type1=Ice |img=Wulfric other Bergmite.png |cap=Wulfric's other Bergmite |epnum=XY120 |epname=All Hail the Ice Battlefield! |vajp= |vaen=Robby Duncan Sharpe |desc=These five {{p|Bergmite}} reside at the Gym, greeting visiting {{pkmn|Trainer}}s when they arrive for a Gym battle. The only known move of two of the Bergmite is {{m|Blizzard}}{{tt|*|In the Poké TV segment for XY120}}.}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{ice color light}}|bordercolor={{ice color dark}} |ja=大友龍三郎 ''[[Ryūzaburō Ōtomo]]'' |en=[[David Brimmer|Michael Alston Baley]] |da=Kasper Leisner |fi=Unknown voice actor ([[XY120]], [[XY122]])
